Document:
# Skill System The jobs are replaced with a skill system. Your character has a set of skills, which handles how well you perform certain types of tasks.
Each skill has various stages, going from "Barely heard of it" to "Absolute Master". You do not know your exact skill level, just an approximation.
## Gaining Skills Outside of praying, you currently cannot improve your skills in any way. This will be done in the future.
## Passions In the character creation menu, you have a tab called "Skills". There, you can distribute passion points (don't confuse them with skill points!). At the start of the round, you get a certain amount of skill points for all the skills, which get distributed randomly. However, by selecting more passion points in the skill, this skill will have increased priority - meaning skills with more passion points will get more skill points on average.
